ksa_text: Knowledge of regulatory enforcement mechanisms, including supervisory authority powers, penalty structures, precedent enforcement actions, and the distinction between binding requirements, regulatory guidance, and industry codes of conduct.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of code tailoring tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.427) to justify inclusion for the Director of Master Data Management. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.427 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Regulatory Compliance. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Regulatory Compliance is not sufficiently central to the Director of Master Data Management to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Master Data Management roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Regulatory Compliance is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Master Data Management. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Master Data Management competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.427) and edge-domain placement (Regulatory Compliance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Master Data Management. All passes support exclusion.
